author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7382984933248041752","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"每一个故事都尤嫌不够看，爽字足以概括，乳腺都通了。无敌文的魅力。
作者很自谦，但实际上看得出来清史做了非常详细的功课，逻辑缜密，脑洞大开。
虽然世界集中在甄嬛传和如懿传，但能把每个单元故事写的各有千秋，每个角色遵从了角色性格底色，女主发挥了原角色12分的魅力。
我很爱后世论坛体，我就好像和后世npc一样对他们叹为观止，弥补了民族发展的遗憾。
高级梗很密集，超爱。现在更新的瓜尔佳文鸳我真是每章都笑，怎么能这么可爱。","text_exts":[{"e":80,"s":77,"text":"甄嬛传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%94%84%E5%AC%9B%E4%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741223573E7C0BFA%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227382984933248041752%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227322775343855586366%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%94%84%E5%AC%9B%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":84,"s":81,"text":"如懿传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A6%82%E6%87%BF%E4%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741223573E7C0BFA%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227382984933248041752%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227322775343855586366%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A6%82%E6%87%BF%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":139,"s":136,"text":"论坛体","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%AE%BA%E5%9D%9B%E4%BD%93&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741223573E7C0BFA%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227382984933248041752%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227322775343855586366%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%AE%BA%E5%9D%9B%E4%BD%93%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718986984,"group_id":"7322775343855586366","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N17Kq+UoJbV
